rawAssistant: A hasty departure already? That lantern business still sticks in my mind - too many loose wires and not enough attention to safety. If you're planning on leaving before dawn, make sure your gear is secure, especially the road kit charms; those things can get lost in the dark. And don't forget to double-check those bedrolls - a good night's rest can be a luxury in Hollowfen.
